scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:ui
scripts.test:continuity: esbuild src/ui/studio/services/continuityReport.selftest.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/continuityReport.selftest.mjs && node dist/continuityReport.selftest.mjs && esbuild src/ui/studio/services/generationPreflight.selftest.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/generationPreflight.selftest.mjs && node dist/generationPreflight.selftest.mjs && esbuild src/ui/studio/services/episodeProduction.selftest.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/episodeProduction.selftest.mjs && node dist/episodeProduction.selftest.mjs
